title: No Lava, but Gardens
description: Replaces the new Lava Chicken music disc with a Garden Awakens themed one, which haven't made it into the game
body: ## Say NO to the Lava Chicken! This resource pack **replaces** the newly added **Lava Chicken** music disc **with** the **Infinite Spookey Amethyst** track, which was released by Minecraft along the Garden Awakens, but haven't made it into the game, including a **custom made texture** for it!
